mission.title: open-policy-agent-opa-: decision log should include values from non-deterministic built-in functions like time.now_ns
mission.description: decision log should include values from non-deterministic built-in functions like time.now_ns. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment
steps.description:
Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
helm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation.

steps.title: Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
kubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-
```
Decision log events should include all of the information necessary to re-execute policy evaluation.

steps.title: Apply the fix for decision log should include values from non-deterministic…
steps.description:
This PR implements support for caching the results of non-deterministic builtins for more complete Decision Logging support. Currently, only the `rego` module and its direct dependents have received the plumbing work this feature requires.

The NDBuiltinCache is ~just a `builtins.Cache`~ a custom 2-level map, modeled off of `builtins.Cache`, which is carefully propagated downwards into the `topdown.BuiltinContext` from the query/eval context. This allows non-deterministic builtins to trivially

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
kubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "decision log should include values from non-deterministic…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This PR implements support for caching the results of non-deterministic builtins for more complete Decision Logging support. Currently, only the `rego` module and its direct dependents have received the plumbing work this feature requires.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with open-policy-agent-opa- installed or the issue environment reproducible.
